title: AI Workflow Proposal v1
description: The shared, versioned proposal envelope every Phase 4 AI workflow produces (OQ #22). A proposal is a SUGGESTION artifact: drafting it writes nothing. The human reviews the exact proposal; only then does an accept command (e.g. `sb fact accept --file`, `sb output create --file`) validate it against this schema and perform the confirmed writes. Provenance is mandatory on every writable item.

workflow.description: Which AI workflow produced this proposal.

version.description: Envelope version. Breaking changes bump this.

items.description: The proposed items. Item shape is workflow-specific (see allOf); braindump/review items are interactive suggestions applied via existing confirmed commands and stay free-form objects here.

allOf.$comment: extract_facts — every item is a fact with full provenance (OQ #23: duplicates are surfaced by the skill, not auto-deduped here).
compose_output — exactly one L5 output note per proposal (v1).

source_ref.description: Provenance: the note ULID this fact was extracted from. Required.

supersedes.description: Optional: id of an existing fact this one supersedes (human picked supersede over add).

sources.description: Provenance the output cites (note/fact ids or links). Non-empty — schema-required for L5. Note ids are resolved by `sb output create` (OQ #24).

body.description: The drafted output body (markdown). Every claim-bearing section must map to a cited source.
